summary: 14-slide Slidev deck assembled under examples/epi-slides/; slidev build succeeds, PDF export skipped (NixOS chromium libglib gap).

artifacts.summary: Assembled a 14-slide Slidev conference deck under examples/epi-slides/ (theme, 7 components, imported task-28 tables/receipts/consort assets, all 14 slides authored with speaker notes, README + REHEARSAL + SPEAKER_NOTES). slidev build succeeds in ~6s; slidev export (PDF) skipped because the Playwright-bundled chromium on NixOS cannot load libglib-2.0.so.0 and no system chromium is available -- documented workaround in README.md.

metadata.phase_partial_reason: slidev build OK; slidev export (PDF) blocked by Playwright chromium missing libglib-2.0.so.0 on NixOS

completion_data.completion_summary: Built a 14-slide Slidev conference deck walking through the examples/epi-study synthetic RCT as a showcase of the /epi workflow; deck source compiles cleanly via slidev build but PDF export is blocked by a NixOS chromium library gap documented in the README.
